official_pick_rules.note: Lab Rating is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: 1 official moneyline pick cleared the stricter model-probability and Lab Rating gates. 3 value-watch setups had good price math but did not clear official-pick probability rules.

lab_score_breakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

games.read: Atlanta Braves is a value watch, not an official pick. LyDia projects 66.5% against a 51.2% no-vig market number, a 15.3% model edge at -109. Lab Rating 9.1/10: model edge 35, pitcher 23.75, bullpen 12.2, market 15, base 5. The setup is strong, but official picks require at least 72.0% model probability and 80/100 Lab Score.
